SCAT.pay_style: pays anywhere per Game Rules sheet

bet_setup.ways_bet_rule: 4096 ways, fixed 20 coin game cost documented

base_game_flow: Select base reelset B1 or B2 using weights B1=58 and B2=42.
Generate 6x4 visible window from selected base reelset.
Check additional COR trigger using Yes=1 and No=9 weights.
If triggered, add 1 to 5 COR symbols using weights 240, 200, 150, 100, 80, excluding positions already occupied by COLLECT, WILD, or SCAT.
Evaluate left-to-right ways wins and scatter wins.
If one or more COLLECT symbols are present on reel 1 and/or reel 6, each COLLECT independently collects all COR/jackpot values visible on the window.
Multiply collected COR/jackpot xBet values by total bet.
If 3 or more SCAT are visible, show feature selection with Free Spins and Blitz Spins options.
Display/accumulate line wins, scatter wins, and COR wins.

free_spins.reelset: F1 for naturally triggered free spins; buy-bonus free spins use BB F2, BB F3, or BB F4 by scatter count.
free_spins.multiplier_application: All WILD multipliers on the window are multiplied together and applied to ways wins, whether or not those WILDs participate. Not applied to SCAT wins.
free_spins.exit: Exit when awarded and retriggered free spins are exhausted.

guarantees: at least one COLLECT per spin
at least one COR per spin
blitz_spins.good_bad_value_table_rule: For normal Blitz Spins, one COR per spin uses the Good table and all other CORs use the Bad table.
blitz_spins.exit: Screen resets every spin; exit when awarded Blitz spins are exhausted.

collect.trigger: At least one COLLECT visible with one or more COR/jackpot values visible.
collect.reward: Each COLLECT independently accumulates all visible COR and jackpot values, then values are multiplied by total bet.

transitions.on: base reelset selected and window generated

evaluation_rules.ways: Standard symbols pay leftmost reel to right in consecutive order using 4096 ways. Each symbol can be used once per winning combination.
evaluation_rules.wild: WILD substitutes for all standard symbols, not SCAT/COR/COLLECT.
evaluation_rules.scatter: Rules documents say SCAT pays anywhere, but Implementation sheet says Free Spins calculate left-to-right Scatter wins. Treat as ambiguous for downstream validation.
evaluation_rules.order: Base implementation sheet orders ways/scatter evaluation before Collect, then feature trigger check.

feature_frequency_depends_on: additional COR does not add SCAT

free_games.pseudo_trigger_note: Pseudo trigger reelsets are present in Buy Bonus FG but are not required for normal base-game flow.

blitz_spins.pseudo_trigger_note: Pseudo trigger reelsets are present in Buy Bonus BF but are not required for normal base-game flow.

assumptions.text: 4096 ways is interpreted as 4 visible positions on each of 6 reels, yielding 4^6 ways.
assumptions.reason: Rule sheets describe a 6x4 window and 4096 ways.

assumptions.text: Normal base-game feature trigger gives the player a choice between Free Spins and Blitz Spins.
assumptions.reason: Rule document states a feature selection screen with two options.

assumptions.text: Feature-buy rows are math-model-supported but player-facing availability is not confirmed.
assumptions.reason: Buy Bonus sheets and costs exist; rules document does not specify jurisdictional availability.

ambiguities.text: Scatter evaluation wording conflicts: game rules say Scatter pays anywhere; Implementation says Free Spins calculate left-to-right Scatter wins.
The phrase each symbol can be used once per winning combination is not formalized for duplicate counting in 4096 ways.

Buy-bonus Free Spins sheet says the entire ways win is multiplied by all Wilds till that reel, while base Free Spins rules say all window Wild multipliers multiply the win regardless of participation.

missing_information.text: Coin denomination and configurable bet ladder beyond fixed 20 coin game cost.
Player-facing feature-buy availability and jurisdictional enablement rules.
Formal duplicate-counting rule for 4096 ways phrase: each symbol can be used once per winning combination.
